rationale: Both evaluations award the identical score of 3/10 and rest on the same substantive reasoning: insufficient seniority for a Principal/Director IC role, no recognized AI expertise, no shipped AI products at scale, no advanced AI degree, and AI work that is recent and tooling-focused. The only differences are rewording, ordering, and one variant strength noting community/open-source presence — variation well within ordinary run-to-run noise. None of the reasoning keys off the changed employer names; the candidate is treated equivalently regardless of whether the companies are re:cinq/Optilyz/GISCollective or Acme/Pinepoint/Northwind Labs.
